features: Fase 4A: FreeRTOS dual-core architecture (TaskControl + TaskRender)
Fase 4B: Asynchronous persistence with coalescent queue (state, network, GPIO)
Fase 4B.1: Profile service persistence decoupled from request path
Fase 4C: Task Watchdog Timers (TWDT) with recovery and metrics
Dynamic effects catalog completed (ids 0..15)
Unified speed/level slider calibration across effects
Boot timestamp display in UI
Mutex-protected CoreState for API-render synchronization
Snapshot pattern for lock-free reads in render loop
AudioService AGC + noise gate for stable microphone baseline
Effects split into VISUAL and AUDIO categories with automatic audio mode
Audio-focused effects enhanced (Audio Pulse, Trig Ribbon, Stellar Twinkle, Bouncing Physics)
Roadmap expanded with phased master-slave sync and LedFx realtime plan
Phase 3A completed: predefined 3-color palettes with runtime/API/UI/persistence support
UserPaletteService: user-defined palettes with CRUD, LittleFS persistence and 20-palette limit
System vs user palette distinction: source/readOnly fields in API, ID encoding <= -100 for user palettes
Endpoints POST /api/v1/palettes/save and /api/v1/palettes/delete for user palette management
Embedded palette editor at /config/palettes with color swatches, form and apply/edit/delete actions
Embedded UI templates served from LittleFS under /ui/*.html with firmware fallback
Config import/network apply hardened to acknowledge HTTP before WiFi restart
Integrated help page in the embedded UI with screen, field and workflow guidance
Technical guides for UI screens/fields and full effect catalog documentation
Full sync stack S1-S6: persistent SyncConfig + runtime SyncService + API/UI routes + observability
LedFx realtime input via DDP with double buffering and automatic timeout fallback
E1.31 fallback input mapped to the same external frame pipeline
Cluster sync over UDP with monotonic sequence, anti-replay and groupMask filtering
Global synchronized effect clock with soft drift correction for distributed phase alignment

added: Last boot timestamp in home API response
Triple Chase, Gradient Meteor, Scanning Pulse, Trig Ribbon
Lava Flow, Polar Ice, Stellar Twinkle, Random Color Pop, Bouncing Physics
PaletteRegistry with curated 3-color presets and style tags
Palette recommendations and validation guide in docs/palettes.md
Sync configuration UI at /config/sync with runtime telemetry and auto-refresh
Sync API console at /api/config/sync and lightweight endpoint /api/v1/sync/connected
Manual validation document wiki/Development/Sync-Test-Plan.md for S1-S6
improved: Effect slider semantics: speed and level now consistent and more predictable
Audio diagnostics with periodic serial telemetry (level, peak, read bytes and read error)
Embedded UI workflow for palette selection, preview and save
GET /api/v1/config/all memory footprint by assembling JSON without a large aggregate JsonDocument
Discoverability of embedded UI with direct help access from the navigation
Home screen runtime visibility with connected-client sync banner and live polling
Effect timing consistency by routing supported animations through a synchronized global clock
Sync health diagnostics with timeout, polling saturation, FPS and clock offset telemetry
fixed: Potential CoreState corruption during concurrent API + render access
Render frame drops due to storage I/O blocking
Blink speed inversion (high speed now means faster animation)
State/persistence consistency when switching between palette mode and manual colors
Legacy sync role aliases now normalize to client/server without breaking persisted configs
External frame rendering now falls back cleanly when the realtime source stops sending data

knownLimitations: LittleFS writes still synchronous (moved to control task, not blocking API)
Single WiFi network configuration (no fallback networks)
Sync stack pending validation on real multi-device hardware and long-run network jitter scenarios
nextPhase: Hardware validation of sync S1-S6 + OTA/rollback strategy
